Bún quậy THIỆN MỸ on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the real deal. 4.7 stars across 399 reviews. That number holds for a reason.

Bún Quậy is Phu Quoc's own noodle dish. You won't find it like this back home. Order it, stir it, eat it fast.
